title: acalypha patens
intro: Acalypha patens, also known as the fan-leaved copperleaf or fan acalypha, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Acalypha patens are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
